data.title: XRP Mining launches cloud app, turning smartphones into mining devices, providing easy, green, and inclusive mining experience.
data.description: XRP Mining, based in Chicago, is transforming cryptocurrency mining by enabling users to convert their smartphones into cloud mining devices. Traditional mining methods are often costly and require technical knowledge, which XRP Mining aims to simplify. The platform supports popular cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin, and XRP, making decentralized finance more accessible. XRP Mining operates professionally-managed data centers and offers a straightforward app for users to engage in cloud mining without purchasing expensive hardware. This initiative aims to democratize mining, allowing anyone to generate passive income sustainably. XRP Mining emphasizes user-friendliness, eco-friendliness, and inclusivity in its cloud mining services, setting a new standard for innovation in the industry. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: ALL4 Mining launches new Google Play app for easy Bitcoin, Dogecoin, and Litecoin mining, with over 9M users worldwide.
data.description: ALL4 Mining has launched a cloud mining app on Google Play that allows users to mine cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Dogecoin, Litecoin, Ethereum, and XRP without needing expensive hardware. The app has attracted over 9 million users in 200 countries and offers mining options across more than ten major coins, providing flexibility to tailor mining strategies to market movements. The platform boasts industry-leading security measures to safeguard users' digital wealth and is positioned as a professional, secure, and user-friendly alternative to traditional mining setups in the evolving digital economy.

data.title: Oncomatryx Biopharma receives €12.5M funding from EIC Accelerator to advance ADCs for oncology. €2.5M grant, €10M equity investment.
data.description: A company in Bilbao, Spain called Oncomatryx Biopharma, known for its innovative Antibody-Drug Conjugates (ADCs) for cancer treatment, has secured funding from the European Innovation Council (EIC) Accelerator in the EU’s Horizon Europe 2021-2027 Research and Innovation Program. Through this program, Oncomatryx will be granted €2.5 million and a €10 million equity investment for its next financing round. This competitive initiative provides significant support for Oncomatryx’s advancements in oncology.

data.title: Scipio Capital launches $100M dual-fund strategy targeting secured credit and distressed equity opportunities.
data.description: A Florida-based alternative asset manager, Scipio Capital Advisors, unveiled the introduction of two complementary investment funds - the SCA Principal Alpha Fund and the SCA Equity Alpha Fund. These funds are part of a venture aiming for a total capital of $100 million. Established under Rule 506(c) of Regulation D, both funds are solely available to accredited investors. The objective behind these funds is to leverage opportunities presented by disruptions in the private credit and distressed asset sectors.

data.title: Agile Occupational Medicine & Akeso Occupational Health merge to create a top West Coast occupational health platform.
data.description: In Los Angeles, two notable companies in the field of occupational health, Agile Occupational Medicine and Akeso Occupational Health, have combined forces to create a dominant occupational health platform on the West Coast. This merger, marked by the hashtag #mergersandacquisitions, signifies a significant move in the industry. The new entity formed by the merger is poised to become a leader in the sector, leveraging the strengths and resources of both organizations. This strategic alignment is expected to bring about enhanced services and broader reach for clients.

data.title: EqualizeRCM sponsors CAH Forum for 5th year, provides education for rural hospitals nationwide.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, on July 17, 2025, EqualizeRCM celebrates its fifth year as the primary sponsor of the CAH CFO/Administrator Forum, a key knowledge-sharing platform for financial leaders in rural hospitals. This quarterly forum is designed to provide support and information exchange.

data.title: Sivers Semiconductors AB corrects typo in AEBITDA number in Q2 report; numbers in the bullet point on page 2 need amended.
data.description: In a press release dated July 17th at 8:00 CET, a typographical error was discovered in the English version of the Q2 report. The correction involves the AEBITDA figure mentioned in the bullet point on page 2. It is important to take note of this correction.

data.title: Summit Park's LEAD Program adds 2 new members: Andrea Franco at Artifact Uprising and Andrew Turner at RuffleButts.
data.description: In Charlotte, N.C., Summit Park has welcomed two new executives to its portfolio companies through the Leadership Excellence and Development ("LEAD") Program. Andrea Franco became the Chief of Staff at Artifact Uprising in July, while Andrew Turner took on the same role at RuffleButts in June. The LEAD Program aims to cultivate skilled executives for leadership roles within Summit Park's portfolio. These new members will report directly to the portfolio companies, contributing to operational success.

At least 60 people have died and 11 others are missing after a fire at a hypermarket in eastern Iraq. The fire, at a newly opened mall in al-Kut city, began on the first floor before rapidly spreading and engulfing the building. The cause of the fire was not immediately known,

data.title: Metaverse market to reach $325 billion by 2030, report by ResearchAndMarkets.com. Technologies, platforms, solutions, and applications analyzed.
data.description: Dublin - A report titled "Metaverse Market by Technologies, Platforms, Solutions, and Applications in Industry Verticals 2025-2030" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report provides an evaluation of the market potential for Metaverse vendors and associated service providers, encompassing infrastructure, devices, software, and supporting services. It offers both qualitative and quantitative analysis of the Metaverse market and its related segments spanning from 2025 to 2030. This comprehensive assessment aims to provide insights into the emerging opportunities in the Metaverse industry.

data.title: Canada retaliates against Trump's 50% steel tariffs with $1 billion rescue plan and new quota system, aiming to protect jobs and ensure fair trade. They announced the implementation of their proposed plan, emphasizing the unsustainable concentration of steel exports to the US. To address the situation, Canada will also implement tariffs on steel imports from non-US countries containing steel melted and poured in China.
data.description: Canada is taking action to protect its steel industry from tariffs by implementing new measures. Prime Minister Mark Carney made the announcement during a visit to a steel fabricator, stating that the plan, proposed a month earlier, is aimed at safeguarding Canadian jobs and promoting fair trade. Currently, over 90% of Canada's steel exports go to the U.S., which Carney described as unsustainable. In response to President Donald Trump's decision to increase tariffs on Canadian steel and aluminum to 50% on June 3, Carney revealed plans to impose tariffs on steel imports from countries outside the U.S. that contain steel originating from China. To address this issue, Carney has suggested the introduction of a new tariff rate quota system, set to begin on August 1.

data.title: American Water participates in fly-in to meet with Congress, discuss water/wastewater challenges; largest utility company in U.S. (#AWK)
data.description: In Camden, New Jersey, American Water (NYSE: AWK), the nation's largest regulated water and wastewater utility company, has revealed its involvement in a companywide fly-in aimed at enhancing ties with policymakers and addressing critical water and wastewater infrastructure issues in the United States. John Griffith, President and CEO, and Cheryl Norton, Executive VP and COO, alongside state leaders, are part of this initiative. The fly-in serves as a platform to explore potential solutions for the significant infrastructure requirements in the industry.

data.title: Broadstreet Global plans to expand self-storage portfolio in Southeast, aiming for 25+ facilities in high-growth markets.
data.description: In Greenville, South Carolina on July 17, 2025, Broadstreet Global, a prominent private equity firm known for its diverse portfolio in infrastructure land development, hospitality, specialty finance, and emerging sectors, revealed a significant increase in its investments in the self-storage sector. The expansion marks a substantial growth in the firm's commitment to this area, signaling a strategic move towards enhancing its presence in this market segment.

data.title: Abbott Labs stock drops 6% due to weak 2025 sales outlook, despite beating quarterly estimates.
data.description: Abbott Laboratories saw its stock price drop by almost 6% on Thursday following the release of its 2025 organic sales forecast, which fell below expectations. Despite exceeding quarterly estimates, the company's outlook for future growth caused concern among investors. The drop in stock price indicates a negative response to Abbott's performance, highlighting the significance of their guidance miss.
